reviews.comment:
En temporada alta se forma fila es normal. Tenés que ir por la mañana. Muy buena atención. Los chicos hacen los que pueden para agilizar la carga . Lo ideal sería tener más personal y surtidores. El día que fuí eran 2 haciendo la carga para todos los autos que estaban esperando.

(Translated by Google)
During peak season, lines form, which is normal. You have to go in the morning. Very good service. The guys do their best to speed up loading. Ideally, there would be more staff and pumps. The day I went, there were two people loading all the cars waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCai1QWVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Por lo gral muy lleno, con colas de más de 10 autos adelante. Buen servicio pero ponen sobreprecios en las naftas.

(Translated by Google)
It's usually very crowded, with lines of more than 10 cars ahead. Good service, but they overcharge for gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodDR2bVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Voy seguido y nunca tuve ningún problema. Pongo 4 estrellas porque no está abierto 24horas. Cierran durante una hora o más durante la noche. Quise cargar a las 6 AM y me dijeron que espere hasta las 7.30. Tuve que ir a mar del plata

(Translated by Google)
I go often and never had any problems. I gave it 4 stars because it's not open 24 hours a day. They close for an hour or more during the night. I wanted to charge at 6 AM and they told me to wait until 7:30. I had to go to Mar del Plata.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocC1fMk5REAE

reviews.comment:
El clásico de santa Clara del Mar. Impecable siempre

(Translated by Google)
The classic from Santa Clara del Mar. Always impeccable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeC0zOF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La unica estacion disponible en el Pueblo. Intente ir dos veces: La 1ra COLAPSADA totalmente, una fila interminable. La 2da fui a las 6am en PLENA TEMPORADA y estaba cerrado....TODO CERRADO. ACA = DECADENCIA. Le pongo 2 estrellas porque desconozco como brindan " EL SERVICIO " que NO me brindaron.

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in town. I tried to go twice: The first time it was completely jammed, an endless line. The second time I went at 6 am in the middle of peak season and it was closed... EVERYTHING CLOSED. This place is a disaster. I'm giving it 2 stars because I don't know how they provide the "service" they didn't give me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMi1hWjhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero deberían ya agrandar el área de servicio de cumbustible poniendo más surtidores, hay que tener en cuenta que todos los del área van a cargar combustible allí y esto de la falta de por lo menos otros dos surtidores entorpece el trabajo de los muchachos de allí y demora todo.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but they really should expand the fuel service area by adding more pumps. Keep in mind that everyone in the area goes there to refuel, and the lack of at least two more pumps hinders the work of the guys there and slows everything down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoczhDOXJBRRAB
